title: S/He Is Still Her/e: The Official Genesis P-Orridge Documentary
original_title: S/He Is Still Her/e: The Official Genesis P-Orridge Documentary
overview: An introduction, conversation, and perhaps goodbye to Genesis P-Orridge, who left an astounding and provocative legacy on the worlds of music, art, performance, religion and the occult. A larger-than-life personality that must be experienced to be grasped, Genesis opens up portals to a way of living that transforms and transcends.
